description_long: This is a large, fantasy-inspired sledgehammer with a robust, rectangular head featuring metallic reinforcements and decorative elements. The head is flanked by spiked, triangular studs on both sides, and a central plaque with runic or stylized writing is visible on the main face. Chains are draped across the front and sides, adding to its ornamental and intimidating appearance. The handle is long, straight, and reinforced with metal bands, ending in a pointed, diamond-shaped pommel. The top of the hammer head is adorned with a sharp, spear-like finial. The overall color palette consists of dark metallic tones with hints of bronze and gold, giving it a heavy, battle-worn look.
description: A large, ornate sledgehammer with a spiked, reinforced head, decorative chains, and a long, metal-banded handle. The hammer features runic markings and a spear-like finial on top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rectangular hammer head with runic plaque, decorative chains, and the pointed finial on top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rows of triangular spikes on the hammer head and the narrow profile of the handle.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with visible chains and the back face of the hammer head.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the triangular spikes and the slim handle.
attribute_handle_type: Straight metal handle with leather wrapping and metal bands, ending in a pointed, diamond-shaped pommel; appears textured for grip.
attribute_head_type: Large, rectangular sledgehammer head with reinforced metallic edges, triangular spikes on the sides, and a spear-like finial on top; features a central plaque with runic markings.
attribute_brand_or_logo: Runic or stylized writing visible on the central plaque; no recognizable brand or logo.
attribute_attachment_or_accessory: Decorative chains attached to the hammer head
